case_title: GIOVANNI NAVARRO VS. MOMAMED ELHILDA et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($35.00 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED AUG-06-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ELHILDA, MOMAMED

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY NAVARRO, GIOVANNI AS TO DEFENDANT ELHILDA, MOMAMED LUXOR CABS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-09-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ELHILDA, MOMAMED LUXOR CABS, INC.
